data.name: Water Effect
data.detailed_description:
遊戲過程：

在這個遊戲中，您需要按照顏色將液體分類到瓶子中。每個瓶子包含不同層次的液體，您的任務是移動它們，讓所有相同顏色的液體聚集在一個瓶子裡。每個動作都需要注意力和策略思考，因為您必須正確地分配液體而不混合顏色。這是一個引人入勝的過程，將使您計劃每一步，以成功完成關卡。

水的迷人效果對每個人都很熟悉，但您知道它還擁有更深、更秘密的力量嗎？根據古老的傳說，當以正確的順序混合彩色水時，會產生一種無法抗拒的魅力——這種魅力如此強大，以至於任何品嚐它的女性都會被不可避免地吸引到您身邊。問題是，您是否具備揭示這種神秘水效應真實魔力的能力，並掌握其迷人力量？準備揭開隱藏了幾個世紀的秘密。您準備好體驗秘密水效應的魅力了嗎？

特點：

  • 愉悅的音樂

  • 美麗的女性

  • 簡單的關卡

  • 放鬆的過程

  • 混合的水

data.short_description: 你能相信古老的傳說，並嘗試檢驗你的力量和毅力，以便了解傳說是否撒謊？

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer, 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-6100 / AMD FX-8350
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 580 / AMD HD 7870
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer, 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4670K / AMD Ryzen 5 1500X
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050 / AMD HD 7970
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Water Effect
data.detailed_description:
GAMEPLAY:

In this game, you'll need to sort liquids in bottles by color. Each bottle contains different layers of liquid, and your task is to move them in such a way that all liquids of the same color end up in the same bottle. Every move requires careful attention and strategic thinking, as you need to properly distribute the liquids without mixing the colors. It's an engaging process that will make you think through every step to successfully complete the level.

The allure of water’s effect is well-known to everyone, but did you know that there is an even deeper, secret power it can hold? According to ancient legends, when colored waters are blended in a precise sequence, a captivating enchantment emerges—one so potent that any woman who tastes it will be irresistibly drawn to you. The question is, do you possess the skill to unlock the true magic of this mysterious Water Effect, and wield its mesmerizing charm? Prepare yourself to uncover secrets that have remained hidden for centuries. Are you ready to experience the enchantment of the Water Effect?

FEATURES:

  • Pleasant music

  • Beautiful girls

  • Simple levels

  • Enjoyable pastime

  • Mix the water.
